title: hieracium pallescens subsp. ovale
intro: Hieracium pallescens subsp. ovale, also known as pale hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues due to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, teas, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
